Att1UnMapAttributeDesc: Remove the mapping between two parameters without deleting the trace link.
ToggleInOutForMappedTableDesc: Change the parameter from input to output  or from output to input.
Att1RemoveMeasurableAttrFromItemRevDesc: Detach the selected parameters from the project or item, and then delete them from the database.
Att1AddMeasurableAttrFromTableDesc: Create a new parameter or add an existing parameter to the selection.
Att1AssociateParamDictonariesDesc: Add an existing parameter dictionary to the parameter project.
Att1PasteAttributeDesc: Add a copy of the parameters from the clipboard to the selection.
Att1PasteParameterDesc: Add a reference copy of the parameters from the clipboard to the selection.
Att1AutoMapAttributesDesc: Automatically create a mapping between pairs of parameters on selected elements.
UnuseAttrForMappedTableDesc: Remove the selected parameters from the verification request.
UnuseAttrForStudyForMappedTableDesc: Remove the selected parameters from the request.
Att1DownloadFileDesc: Download the selected file to your computer.
Att1ReplaceFileDesc: Replace the goal or measurement file with a new file.
Att1ImportAttributeDataDesc: Import parameter values from an Excel file.
Att1ShowChildrenForParamGroupDesc: Show the children of the parameter group.
Att1OpenGroupOrParamterDesc: Open the selected parameter group or parameter in location.
Att1AddParameterGroupDesc: Create a new parameter group and add it to the selected parameter project or group.
Att1SetUnPinMapAttrPanelDesc: Close the panel after the task is complete.
Att1SetUnPinAddParameterGroupPanelDesc: Close the panel after the task is complete.
Att1DeleteGroupDesc: Delete the selection from the parameter project.
SaveEditAttributeProxyTableDesc: Save the changes made in the parameter table.
CancelEditAttributeProxyTableDesc: Discard any edits made in the table.
Att1AddMeasurementFileDesc: Add a file to the parameter to store measurements with text and images.
Att1ImportNewDesc: Import new parameter values into the parameter project. Use an Excel file to import simple parameters. Use a ZIP file to include Excel and goal files for complex parameters.
Att1SetFreezePointDesc: Record a set of parameter values for the current configuration.
SaveEditInDefAttributeTableDesc: Save the changes made to the parameter definition.
CancelEditAttributeMappingTableDesc: Discard any edits made in the mapping table.
CancelEditInDefAttributeTableDesc: Discard any edits made in the parameters table.
Att1ExportParamTableDesc: Export parameter definitions in a parameter dictionary to an Excel file.
Att1ExportImportParamTableDesc: Export the selections to Excel, make changes in the Excel sheet, and then re-import the parameters.
Att1RemoveMeasurableAttrFromItemRev12xDe: Delete the parameter from the database
Att1AddAttrFromTableDesc: Add a new or existing parameter
Att1AddAParamValueFromTableDesc: Duplicate the parameter and assign a variant condition which matches the current variant rule.
Att1ReviseAndReplaceParameterDesc: Revise the parameter and replace it with the new revision
Att1ReplaceParameterRevisionDesc: Replace the current parameter with a different revision
Att1SetParameterDirectionDesc: Define how a parameter is used in the current context and set it as input, output or unused.
Att1SetUnusedDirectionDesc: Unuse the parameter from contributing to the current context.
